title: 皐月賞の後に・アンクシャス

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Biwa Hayahide comes away victorious
from the Satsuki Sho, she can't help but feel that
something about her calculations is off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's fierce competitive spirit is a value
that her equation can't account for.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then there's Winning Ticket and her undying
determination to win the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby is the stage where the three
rivals will meet again, but can Biwa Hayahide
quell her anxiety before then?
